concept: Construct an arcade challenge where you operate a fantastical elevator connecting impossibly distant realms that shouldn't logically intersect. Transport increasingly bizarre passengers to their metaphysically correct destinations while managing interdimensional pressure differentials and temporal displacement effects. Upgrade your elevator with reality-stabilizing technology recovered from between-places that exist in the maintenance shafts. Investigate mysterious pattern changes in passenger destinations that suggest someone is deliberately manipulating cosmic boundaries for unknown purposes.
